scripts.preinstall:
sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "

This project uses pnpm. Please run: pnpm install
(install pnpm with: npm install -g pnpm)
" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev:web: cross-env-shell PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:8080 "pnpm --filter @workspace/city-sandbox run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && cross-env-shell PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ "pnpm -r --if-present run build"
scripts.start: pnpm run build && pnpm run start:prod
scripts.start:web: cross-env-shell PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:8080 "pnpm --filter @workspace/city-sandbox run serve"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
